svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/28.2.5 Chrome/138.0.7204.251 Electron/37.6.1 Safari/537.36" version="28.2.5" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Consent Pipeline" id="consent_pipeline"> <mxGraphModel dx="2066" dy="1235" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="720" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="s0" value="CRTDL cohortDefinition" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="33" width="320" height="44" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" value="1. Extract consent codes from CRTDL" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="106" width="340" height="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" value="2. Required codes co-occur?" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="230" y="182" width="260" height="72" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="err2" value="Reject request&#xa;(ConsentFormatException)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="540" y="194" width="170" height="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" value="3. Fetch active Consent resources from FHIR" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="286" width="340" height="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" value="4. Encounter adjustment&#xa;(shift .6 start to earliest overlapping Encounter)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="356" width="340" height="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5" value="5. Apply retro modifiers per resource&#xa;(.45/.46: extend .6 start to 1900-01-01)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="436" width="340" height="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s6" value="6. Merge permits (full-package only)&#xa;&amp; subtract global denies" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="516" width="340" height="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s7" value="7. Gate check (.8):&#xa;today within permit period?" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="230" y="606" width="260" height="72" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="err7" value="Exclude patient" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="540" y="624" width="170" height="36" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s8" value="8. Intersect data periods (.6)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="716" width="340" height="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s9" value="9. Enforce during data extraction" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="796" width="340" height="48" as="geometry"
